events.title: Public Hearing - Education Parcel Tax Election
events.location: Walnut Creek School District Office, 960 Ygnacio Valley Road, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
events.description: Notice of Public Hearing regarding calling an election to levy a new education parcel tax. The Walnut Creek School District Governing Board will hold a public hearing at a board meeting on February 23, 2026, at 6:00 p.m. (or as soon thereafter as convenient) to receive public comment regarding whether the District should call an election to create a new $98 parcel tax for nine years with annual inflation adjustments, pursuant to Government Code Section 50079. Any interested persons, including all persons owning lands in the District, may appear and be heard at this public hearing.
